name: Recruit Bay Expansion
description: Increases the number of recruits you can have at once.

name: Mission Board Expansion
description: Increases the number of missions available on the board at once.

name: Docking Station Expansion
description: Adds a new docking station, increasing the number of ships you can own at once.

name: Shop Rotation Expansion
description: Increases the number of items listed in the shop at once.

name: Stash Expansion
description: Increases the number of distinct consumable stacks you can hold in your stash at once.

name: Shop Refresh Accelerator
description: Shortens the interval between shop rotation refreshes.

name: Mission Refresh Accelerator
description: Shortens the interval between mission board refreshes.

name: Medbay Regeneration
description: Speeds up passive HP regeneration for recruits who aren't on a mission.

name: Concurrent Operas
description: Increases the number of operas that can run at once.

name: Candidate Refresh Accelerator
description: Shortens the interval between candidate pool refreshes.
